colorMode.toggle: Switch between dark and light mode

hero.copy: Z-SOFT helps businesses turn complex problems into clear digital products — stable in operation and ready to scale, from strategy and architecture to real-world delivery.
hero.noteText: A product engineering studio serving clients at home and abroad.

philosophy.body: A software project only truly succeeds when it produces measurable business results. That is why Z-SOFT starts by understanding your goals, risks and operations — before choosing a technology or writing a single line of code.

service1.cardText: Experienced engineers, a transparent process, flexible to each model of collaboration.
service1.title:
Extend your team.
Accelerate your vision.
service1.copy: Z-SOFT works as an extended technology partner: we analyse the problem together, set priorities, control scope and take responsibility for the quality of what we ship.
service1.point1: Scope, timeline and acceptance criteria defined clearly from the start.
service1.point2: Transparent progress through sprints, regular demos and risk reports.
service1.point3: Architecture designed for security, performance and scalability.

service2.cardText: From market research and system design to delivering and operating SaaS products.
service2.title:
Products shaped by
real business.
service2.copy: Z-SOFT builds and runs its own SaaS platforms. That experience lets us see a product as a complete business system — not just a beautiful interface or a set of working features.
service2.point1: Shaping the product around real needs and prioritised value.
service2.point2: Designing a consistent, easy-to-use experience that fits how you operate.
service2.point3: Preparing the foundation for growth, integration and long-term development.

process.title:
Structured execution.
Predictable quality.
process.intro: Every project is governed as a clear chain of decisions. You always know where the project stands, which risks are being handled and what value will be delivered next.

step1.title: Discover
step1.copy: Clarify the business goals, users, current processes and the constraints that matter.

step2.title: Define
step2.copy: Turn the problem into scope, priorities, a roadmap and verifiable acceptance criteria.

step3.title: Design
step3.copy: Design the experience, the business flows and the system architecture before building.

step4.title: Build
step4.copy: Build in short sprints, with code review, continuous testing and regular demos.

step5.title: Validate
step5.copy: Assess function, performance, security and readiness for real-world operation.

step6.title: Evolve
step6.copy: Monitor after launch, improve from data, and accompany you through growth stages.

quality.title: Quality is not the final checking step.
quality.copy: Quality goes into every decision: from how modules are split and data is managed, to change control, deployment and recovery when something goes wrong.

item1.title: Architecture Review
item1.copy: Reviewing architecture, dependencies, scalability and operating cost.

item2.title: Engineering Standards
item2.copy: Code review, coding conventions, version control and consistent technical documentation.

item3.title: Security Mindset
item3.copy: Authorisation, data protection, audit trails and least-privilege access by principle.

item4.title: Release Discipline
item4.copy: Isolated environments, pre-release testing, rollback and post-deployment monitoring.

engagement.title: A model of collaboration for every stage.

card1.title: Dedicated Team
card1.copy: Quickly scale your development capacity with a stable team that works as part of your company.

card2.title: Project Delivery
card2.copy: Z-SOFT owns everything from analysis and design to delivery, against an agreed scope and outcome.

card3.title: Product Partnership
card3.copy: We accompany you in shaping, building, running and continuously improving the product.

products.title: A family of digital products.
products.copy: An ecosystem built for businesses, teams and communities — sharing one philosophy: simple, flexible and able to grow for the long term.

item1.title: Z-Cloud Workspace
item1.copy: A unified digital workplace: chat, mail, files, documents, meetings and tasks.

item2.title: Z-Auto
item2.copy: A SaaS platform for car showrooms: inventory, customers and business performance.

item3.title: Z-Pets
item3.copy: A community for pet lovers, connecting owners, shops and services.

item4.title: Z-Edu
item4.copy: Digital education for schools, training centres and modern learning models.

item5.title: Z-Focus
item5.copy: A tool that helps people and teams focus on what matters, reduce interruptions and work better.

stats.quote: A business doesn't need another software vendor. It needs a partner who understands how technology creates advantage.

metric4.label: Capability across the Vietnam and Japan markets

cta.title: Let's build something meaningful.
cta.copy: Let's start with a clear conversation about goals, the current situation and risks. Z-SOFT will help you find the right direction before proposing a solution.
